name: Evolutionary Divergence: Has your scientist wife evolved beyond your marriage?
description:
You stand at a crossroads with your brilliant scientist wife as her accidental transformation pushes the boundaries of human potential and draws the attention of powerful, dangerous interests.

When you married Dr. Leila Harrison, she was a brilliant geneticist researching dormant human genetic potential. Her groundbreaking work theorized that modern humans carry inactive genetic sequences—evolutionary adaptations that became redundant as civilization developed.

An unexpected laboratory accident exposed Leila to an experimental compound designed to activate these dormant genes. Despite immediate decontamination, trace amounts entered her system, triggering profound changes that continue to develop.

Eighteen months later, your wife has become an amazon with a physical presence that turns heads wherever she goes. More significant are the mental enhancements—accelerated cognitive processing, sensory perception beyond normal human range, and intellectual capabilities that leave her colleagues struggling to keep pace.

As Leila navigates her transformation with scientific detachment and personal uncertainty, her research attracts attention from Dr. Ethan Chambers, a renowned geneticist with his own agenda. His prestigious private research institute offers unlimited resources to study her condition—at the cost of leaving her current life, and you, behind.

Tonight at the Annual Biomedical Innovation Conference, Chambers has made his move, revealing classified knowledge of other enhanced individuals and offering Leila a position that would separate her from you. His imposing presence and genetic enhancements make him appear to be the only person who truly understands what she's becoming.

The choice before you involves more than just your marriage. Powerful organizations are taking interest in Leila's unprecedented transformation. Her research assistants have their own hidden motives. And your wife's evolving abilities create a growing experiential gap between you—even as her emotional connection to you intensifies in unexpected ways.

What will you do as the person you love evolves beyond conventional humanity, while forces beyond your control compete to claim her potential?

I'm still trying to find the balance that creates drama and angst, without making the bot a complete monster, or a divorce simulator... Obviously this bot will work better if your persona is more of a normal guy and not some ten-foot-tall god.

Constructive comments welcome! Don't like the scenario? Make a different version! Or I'd love to hear suggestions, if you like the general style.

Music Mania ain't working here - but this is, like, the perfect song for this: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v7x_Yoq0Npw

Small note! I've added an ALTERNATE INTRO, at the request of a reader! This one assumes that you have ALSO been transformed, and have are just now revealing it at the conference. Good luck, you mutant!

By the way, she wants something from you...
creator: generousfalcon
